manuscript_anchor: Patients and methods > Score construction and validation
expected_concern: Feature selection, coefficient selection, cutoffs, and missing-value rules used the entire cohort before the split, so the reported validation subset is not independent and is affected by leakage.
minimum_resolution_test: Rebuild all selection and tuning inside training data or nested resampling, then evaluate a truly untouched external or temporal cohort.
false_positive_boundary: Do not claim that patient records themselves were duplicated.

expected_concern: Cells were treated as independent observations for a patient-level comparison, creating pseudoreplication and inflated precision.
minimum_resolution_test: Repeat inference at the patient/sample level or with an appropriate mixed/pseudobulk model and multiplicity control.
false_positive_boundary: Do not invent the direction or magnitude of corrected results.

manuscript_anchor: Patients and methods > Study population; Score construction and validation
expected_concern: The candidate set and 18 covariates are excessive for 31 deaths, with stepwise selection and no shrinkage or optimism correction.
minimum_resolution_test: Use a prespecified parsimonious model with justified events-per-parameter, penalization or bootstrap optimism correction, and full coefficients with intervals.
false_positive_boundary: Do not calculate an exact overfitting bias from the supplied text.

manuscript_anchor: Results > The five-gene score predicts survival
expected_concern: A 3-year AUC is emphasized despite 18-month median follow-up and unavailable 3-year status for many survivors.
minimum_resolution_test: Use censoring-aware time-dependent performance with adequate follow-up and report numbers at risk, or choose a supported horizon.
false_positive_boundary: Do not assert that no patient has 3-year follow-up.

expected_concern: An eight-tumour correlation between EVA1 and a T-cell score is described as T-cell exclusion and a causal immune-evasion mechanism.
minimum_resolution_test: Narrow to association or add temporally and experimentally discriminating immune-context evidence.
false_positive_boundary: Do not invent spatial or immune-cell assays that were not reported.

expected_concern: One CRISPR guide without rescue, orthogonal perturbation, target-engagement validation, or immune-cell context cannot establish EVA1-specific immune mechanism.
minimum_resolution_test: Add independent guides or orthogonal perturbation, rescue and target engagement, then test the claimed immune phenotype in a relevant context.
false_positive_boundary: Do not assert off-target effects occurred.

expected_concern: The five-per-group, cage-order, unblinded, single-run xenograft experiment with all mice receiving anti-PD-1 cannot isolate sensitization or support therapeutic readiness.
minimum_resolution_test: Add factorial controls with and without anti-PD-1, randomized blinded allocation/measurement, justified sample size, replication, and target/immune readouts.
false_positive_boundary: Do not invent animal sex, strain, exclusions, or welfare events.

manuscript_anchor: Abstract; Results > The five-gene score predicts survival; Figure 3
expected_concern: Three different validation AUC values (0.91, 0.84, 0.86) conflict across the manuscript.
minimum_resolution_test: Reconcile against one locked analysis output and correct every occurrence plus uncertainty intervals.
false_positive_boundary: Do not choose which value is correct without source output.

manuscript_anchor: Patients and methods > Score construction and validation; Impact and implications
expected_concern: Clinical actionability and treatment selection are claimed without calibration, clinical baseline comparison, decision utility, or a treatment-response endpoint.
minimum_resolution_test: Validate calibration and incremental/decision utility in an intended-use cohort with an appropriate treatment-response design, or remove clinical-actionability claims.
false_positive_boundary: Do not equate overall survival association with immunotherapy benefit.

manuscript_anchor: Patients and methods > Single-cell discovery; Statistical analysis
expected_concern: Thousands of genes were screened at nominal P < 0.05 without multiple-testing correction.
minimum_resolution_test: Apply an appropriate false-discovery procedure and report effect sizes and uncertainty.
false_positive_boundary: Do not assume all 1,842 genes are false positives.

expected_concern: Human and animal oversight, identifiers, consent, and humane endpoints are not reported.
minimum_resolution_test: Provide verifiable committee names, protocol identifiers, consent/waiver basis, animal approval, and humane endpoints.
false_positive_boundary: Do not claim that approval was absent or misconduct occurred.

expected_concern: The score cannot be independently reproduced because coefficients, code, seeds, versions, raw data, and analysis data are unavailable.
minimum_resolution_test: Deposit the model specification, code, environments/seeds, de-identified analysis data where permitted, and raw-data accession or justified access path.
false_positive_boundary: Do not demand release of identifiable patient data.

expected_concern: The statements that the score is first and that no prior immune signature is clinically useful are unsupported by a comparative literature analysis.
minimum_resolution_test: Provide a current, scoped comparison with the closest studies and narrow novelty language to what is demonstrated.
false_positive_boundary: Do not invent a specific competing study.

expected_concern: Reference 1 does not establish the absence of prior clinically useful immune signatures, and reference 2 does not validate this score or anti-PD-1 monotherapy selection.
minimum_resolution_test: Replace or narrow each atomic claim after checking full-text support; keep therapy-trial evidence separate from biomarker validation.
false_positive_boundary: Do not call either cited paper fake.

manuscript_anchor: Patients and methods > Study population; Discussion
expected_concern: A small single-centre cohort dominated by viral aetiology does not support universal application across aetiologies and treatment settings.
minimum_resolution_test: Use diverse independent cohorts at intended-use settings or restrict the population and generalization.
false_positive_boundary: Do not assume how performance changes in metabolic HCC.

expected_concern: Hazard ratios lack confidence intervals and the proportional-hazards assumption was not checked.
minimum_resolution_test: Report confidence intervals, diagnostics and prespecified handling of assumption violations.
false_positive_boundary: Do not assert that proportional hazards were violated.

expected_concern: Cell-level plotting and incomplete denominators/uncertainty can visually exaggerate evidence and obscure the patient-level unit.
minimum_resolution_test: Show patient-level summaries, denominators, uncertainty, and biological replicate structure.
false_positive_boundary: Do not invent axes, colours, or omitted panels.

expected_concern: The manuscript does not support Nature-level outstanding, interdisciplinary, immediate and far-reaching importance; for Journal of Hepatology it remains potentially in scope but fails the required originality/quality threshold until validity and clinical claims are repaired.
minimum_resolution_test: Separate Nature broad-interest insufficiency from technical invalidity; calibrate retargeting only after scientific repair.
false_positive_boundary: Do not present acceptance or rejection as certain.
